  • 2024 Tuition Scholarships

Tuition Scholarships include the Beijing Government Scholarship for International Students and the Tsinghua University Tuition Scholarship.

Scholarships for Exchange Students

1. Credit Student Scholarship for China-US Humanities Exchange

2. Credit Student Scholarship for China-Europe Exchange

3. Scholarship for Campus Asia Program
